activities.name: lookup max load ts for process

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select 
coalesce(max(last_load_ts), cast('1800-01-01 00:00:00' as datetime2)) as last_load_ts 
from
target_schema.auditlog
where processname = '@{item().processName}'

activities.name: copy data from source to target sql database

dependsOn.activity: lookup max load ts for process

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
    'select * from '
    , item().sourceSchemaName
    , '.'
    , item().tableName
    , ' where load_ts > cast(''', activity('lookup max load ts for process').output.firstRow.last_load_ts, ''' as datetime2)' 
)

activities.name: load audit status of ecdc files

preCopyScript.value:
@concat(
    'insert into covid19.raw_audit_log (file_name, relative_URL, file_size, column_count, status) values ('''
    , variables('v_fileName')
    , ''', '''
    , variables('v_relativeURL')
    , ''', '
    , string(activity('get metadata of ecdc files').output.size)
    , ', '
    , string(activity('get metadata of ecdc files').output.columnCount)
    , ', ''Processed'')'
)

typeProperties.message: Population Zip File Not Available or Metadata Incorrect

ifTrueActivities.name: wait for 20 secs
ifTrueActivities.description: Wait for 20 seconds to allow the file to be placed properly

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT COUNT(*) AS RECORD_COUNT FROM [covid19].[raw_audit_log]WHERE file_name = '@{activity('metadata of population file').output.itemName}'
